summary: Tested all FREE11 Production Release Candidate features (iteration 33): 23/23 backend tests pass. All core frontend features verified. Two minor issues found: duplicate title tags in index.html and SkillDisclaimerModal/ShareCard not yet integrated into any page.

ui_bugs.issue: Duplicate <title> tags — 3 <title> elements at lines 23, 50, 64. Only the last one ('FREE11 - Your Time = Free Shopping List') takes effect in the browser, overriding the correct SEO title on line 23.

Components are defined with correct data-testids in /components/ folder but NOT imported/used in any page (no import found in any .js page). The review request requires 'SkillDisclaimerModal renders and closes correctly' and 'ShareCard renders with share button' — neither can be tested as they're not mounted anywhere.

action_items: Fix index.html: Remove duplicate <title> tags at lines 50 and 64. Keep only the SEO-optimized title at line 23: 'FREE11 Fantasy Cricket App - Free Predictions & Real Rewards India'.
Integrate SkillDisclaimerModal into at least one page (e.g., Shop, SponsoredPools, Landing footer skill-disclaimer section). Add a trigger button or auto-show on first visit.
Integrate ShareCard into at least one page (e.g., Dashboard after redemption, Leaderboards after rank achieved). Currently both components are orphaned.
critical_code_review_comments: index.html: 3 duplicate <title> tags (lines 23, 50, 64) — browser renders the last one ('FREE11 - Your Time = Free Shopping List') which is stale/wrong. Remove lines 50 and 64 title tags.
SkillDisclaimerModal.js & ShareCard.js: Both components are complete with correct data-testids and framer-motion animations but are not imported in any page. They are orphaned components.
Landing.js: 'scale-section' is placed AFTER the footer (lines 323-354), which means it renders below the footer in the page flow. This is a layout ordering issue.
Landing.js: 'seo-section' is also placed after the footer (lines 356-379). SEO content block should be above the footer for proper page flow.

success_rate.frontend: 87% (13/15 verified items pass, 2 not testable due to missing integration)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend APIs for production release candidate are working: /api/v2/kpis/breakage (unredeemed_coin_ratio_pct), /api/v2/push/templates, /api/auth/google-oauth (returns 401 for invalid session), /api/v2/router/skus (dynamic_coin_price). Landing page hero/scale/SEO/tagline all working. Blog page /blog/ipl-guide fully functional with FAQ, H1, CTA. Login has Google OAuth button. Admin V2 ARR forecast chart renders. Two outstanding issues: 1) duplicate title tags in index.html, 2) SkillDisclaimerModal and ShareCard are orphaned components not integrated into any page.

frontend: Landing page hero with stadium background image ✅
Blog keywords: FREE11, IPL 2026, free fantasy cricket, PRORGA ✅
Admin V2 analytics tab ARR forecast chart (data-testid=arr-forecast-chart) ✅
index.html OG title + description meta tags ✅
SkillDisclaimerModal: component defined with correct data-testids but NOT integrated in any page ⚠️
ShareCard: component defined with correct data-testids but NOT integrated in any page ⚠️
